---
title: "Performance Measurement and Management"
format: html
---

### Learning Objectives of the Chapter {.unnumbered}

::: {.callout-note title = "Learning Objectives" collapse = "true"}
::: {style="text-align: justify"}
At the End of the Chapter, Students should be Able to -

- Gain an understanding about the importance of Performance Measurement 

- Learn different performance management techniques

- Learn different tools and techniques for performance measurement and management 

::: 

:::


## Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)




## Balanced Scorecard 




## Financial Ratio Analysis
